letter_text:
U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
REQUEST FOR EVIDENCE (RFE)
CASE TYPE: I-130, Petition for Alien Relative
PETITIONER: JOHN SMITH

We need more evidence to continue processing your case. To complete our review, submit the following:
1. Proof of the bona fide marriage (joint bank statements, lease, photos together over time).
2. A copy of the petitioner's birth certificate with certified English translation.

YOU MUST SUBMIT THE REQUESTED EVIDENCE SO THAT IT IS RECEIVED BY: April 30, 2026.

If we do not receive a response by that date, we may deny your case based on the current record. Include a copy of this entire notice on top of your response and mail it to the address shown.
